description: Perform dimension reduction on the dataset to make it easier to reliably assess similarity or distances between cells. Starting from the genes selected in the STREAM.FeatureSelection module, we project cells to a lower dimensional space using a non-linear dimensionality reduction method.
author: Ted Liefeld, UCSD School of Medicine.
plan:
## STREAM.DimensionReduction GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
STREAM.DimensionReduction is a GenePattern module that Perform dimension reduction on the dataset to make it easier to reliably assess similarity or distances between cells. Starting from the genes selected in the STREAM.FeatureSelection module, we project cells to a lower dimensional space using a non-linear dimensionality reduction method.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 12 parameters:
- Required: data.file, output.filename, num.components.to.keep, method, num.components.to.plot, component.x, figure.legend.num.columns
- Optional: percent.neighbor.cells, feature, component.y, figure.width, figure.height

### 3. Command Line
```
python /stream/dimred_command_line.py -m <data.file> -of <output.filename> <percent.neighbor.cells> <num.components.to.keep> <feature>  <method> <num.components.to.plot> <component.x> <component.y> <figure.width> <figure.height>  <figure.legend.num.columns>  -n_jobs <job.cpuCount>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/stream_dimensionreduction\:0.3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.file
parameters.description: A STREAM pkl file containing gene expression data

parameters.name: percent.neighbor.cells
parameters.description: The percentage neighbor cells (only valid when 'mlle', 'se', or 'umap' is specified).

parameters.name: feature
parameters.description: Feature used for dimension reduction. Choose from ['var_genes','top_pcs','all']. 'var_genes'\: most variable genes. 'top_pcs'\: top principal components.  'all'\: all genes

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Method used for dimension reduction.Choose from {{'mlle','umap','pca'}}

parameters.name: num.components.to.plot
parameters.description: Number of components to be plotted.

parameters.name: figure.legend.num.columns
parameters.description: The number of columns that the legend has.
